posts.author: OmerK (Omer Koort)
posts.cookedHtml:
In the first video of our series, I hosted our API Product Manager, Daniel Hai, for a walkthrough session on the API Playground.

I personally learned a lot from this session (and now I know I can use the Ask AI button for anything I’m unsure about!).

What topics would you like us to cover in future videos? Let us know in the comments
